creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text: Some time after 12.0-CURRENT made its debut, sysutils/screen started crashing whenever I use vertical regions, C-x |. It doesn't crash immediately. 11.x and older doesn't have this problem. sysutils/screen isn't compiled differently in any of the actively maintained branches. It doesn't matter if I use plain xterm, sterm (st), Alacritty, or PuTTY from Windows. Running sysutils/screen without any regions is pretty much safe. Maybe sysutils/tmux is the way forward. I know this isn't much to go on, but at least a PR has been created.
